title: Kids Program
overview: A fun, age-appropriate introduction to tennis for children ages 5-10. Our Red, Orange, and Green ball progression builds coordination, confidence, and a lifelong love of the game.
schedule:
Monday & Wednesday: 4:00 PM - 5:00 PM
Saturday: 9:00 AM - 10:30 AM
Optional match play Sunday mornings.

title: Teenagers Program
overview: Designed for players ages 11-17, this program develops technical skills, tactical awareness, and competitive maturity through structured drills and match play.
schedule:
Tuesday & Thursday: 4:30 PM - 6:00 PM
Friday: 4:00 PM - 5:30 PM
Saturday match play: 2:00 PM - 4:00 PM

title: Adults Program
overview: Flexible coaching for adult players of all levels. Whether you are learning the basics, returning to tennis, or competing in leagues, our adult programs fit your schedule.
schedule:
Morning Clinics: Tue & Thu 7:00 AM - 8:30 AM
Evening Clinics: Mon & Wed 7:00 PM - 8:30 PM
Weekend Social Tennis: Saturday 10:00 AM

title: Elite Performance Program
overview: Our flagship program for serious junior and adult competitors. Personalized training, tournament scheduling, fitness, and mental performance coaching.
schedule:
Monday - Friday: 2:00 PM - 6:00 PM
Saturday: 8:00 AM - 12:00 PM
Private sessions scheduled individually.
